body_txt: The vocal counterpart to Love at First Sight . Bob instantly falls in love with Alice when he hears her Beautiful Singing Voice . Brings to mind creatures of Classical Mythology like the Greek Sirens , who have a specialized Compelling Voice that instantly makes men unable to resist them. This trope can be compounded with Love Before First Sight if it is solely the voice that causes the attraction. Compare Duet Bonding and Love Theme .
